name: Oyster Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 x Salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the oysters in their liquor until their edges just begin to curl.
2. Add milk, butter, salt, and pepper.
3. Heat slowly, being careful not to boil.
4. Serve immediately. For an extra "zip," sprinkle seafood seasoning on each serving.
